code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let text = io.read_to_end()
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(text)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < parts.len()
    match parts.get(i)
    when Some(s)
      match string.parse_int(s)
      when Some(n)
        nums = list.push(nums, n)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  match list.max(nums)
  when Some(m)
    println("max=#{m}")
  when None
    ()
  end
  match list.min(nums)
  when Some(n)
    println("min=#{n}")
  when None
    ()
  end
end
